moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The climax of the biggest football tournament on the planet, the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, takes place on July 19th in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Who's making it to the biggest game in football? The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is just over a week away! Sunday 19th July, get it in your diary.

angles.name: Global Showpiece
angles.copy: It's been a month of incredible action, but only two teams can reach the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final. Who are you backing for glory?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend with the Ladies' Singles Final on Saturday, July 11th, and the Gentlemen's Singles Final on Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Finale
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! It's Wimbledon Finals Weekend! Who will lift the trophies on Centre Court? Ladies' Final Saturday, Men's Final Sunday.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: The tension is building! All eyes are on Centre Court this weekend for the Wimbledon Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals. Expect drama!

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from July 16th to 19th.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale next week! Who's your pick to lift the coveted Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale Beckons
angles.copy: Get ready for links golf at its finest! The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale teeing off next Thursday.

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival, one of the UK's biggest urban music festivals, kicks off at Finsbury Park, London, from July 10th to 12th, featuring major hip-hop, rap, and R&B artists.

angles.name: Wireless Weekend
angles.copy: London, are you ready? Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park this weekend! Who are you buzzing to see live?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Big beats and massive acts! Wireless Festival is ON this weekend. Expect huge performances from the biggest names in urban music.

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart gets its weekly update this Friday, July 11th, revealing the latest top-selling tracks and new entries across the country.

angles.name: Chart Race Friday
angles.copy: Who's going to number one? The Official UK Singles Chart is updated this Friday! Any predictions for the top spot?

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: New music dropping and the charts updating! What tunes are you hoping to see climb the Official UK Singles Chart this Friday?

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, the iconic frontwoman of Hole and a defining voice of '90s grunge, turns 62 today, July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen's Day
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love! From Hole to Hollywood, a true icon of the 90s.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 62nd Birthday to rock royalty, Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Happy 69th Birthday, Marc Almond
moments.blurb: Synth-pop legend Marc Almond, best known as the lead vocalist of Soft Cell, celebrates his 69th birthday today, July 9th.

angles.name: Tainted Love Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 69th Birthday to the incredible Marc Almond! Still 'Tainted Love' after all these years.

angles.name: Soft Cell Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Soft Cell's iconic frontman, Marc Almond, who turns 69 today! What's your favourite Soft Cell hit?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the legendary guitarist and songwriter for Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on Sunday, July 11th.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Get your air guitars ready! Wishing a huge Happy 67th Birthday to Bon Jovi legend, Richie Sambora, this Sunday!

angles.name: Livin' on a Prayer Birthday
angles.copy: This Sunday, we're celebrating Richie Sambora's 67th Birthday! The man behind some of Bon Jovi's biggest hits.

moments.title: Happy 48th Birthday, Matt Bellamy
moments.blurb: Matt Bellamy, the dynamic lead singer and guitarist of Muse, will turn 48 on July 14th.

angles.name: Muse Mastermind
angles.copy: Next Tuesday, we're celebrating Matt Bellamy's 48th Birthday! The incredible frontman of Muse. What's your favourite Muse anthem?

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a future Happy 48th Birthday to Muse's Matt Bellamy on July 14th! An absolute legend on guitar and vocals.

moments.title: Happy 93rd Birthday, Willie Nelson
moments.blurb: Country music icon Willie Nelson, known for his prolific songwriting and distinctive style, will celebrate his 93rd birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Country Legend's Day
angles.copy: On Wednesday, we're celebrating the incredible Willie Nelson's 93rd Birthday! A true living legend of country music.

angles.name: Iconic Outlaw
angles.copy: Happy 93rd Birthday next Wednesday to the Red Headed Stranger, Willie Nelson! What's your go-to Willie track?

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the influential drummer and co-founder of The Police, will celebrate his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're wishing a huge Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police!

angles.name: Rhythm King
angles.copy: From 'Roxanne' to movie scores, Stewart Copeland turns 74 next Thursday! Celebrate the incredible drummer of The Police.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Brian May
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic guitarist and songwriter for Queen, will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Get ready to rock! This Sunday, we're celebrating the legendary Sir Brian May's 79th Birthday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: A Kind of Magic Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May on Sunday! A true musical icon and astrophysicist.

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Approaching
moments.blurb: Families across the UK are looking forward to the start of the main school summer holidays, with many schools breaking up in the final weeks of July.

angles.name: Summer Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Who's excited for the school summer holidays to finally begin? What are your plans? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Freedom Feels
angles.copy: That feeling when you know summer holidays are just around the corner! Teachers, parents, kids - almost there! #SchoolHolidays
